pi_items.source: task.json description explicitly assigns this role to the user.
task.json description explicitly states the environment is a FinTech startup.
setup_task.sh and process_dataset.py configure the output path as data/output_encrypted.csv within the workspace.
setup_task.sh downloads bank.zip from https://archive.ics.uci.edu/ml/machine-learning-databases/00222/bank.zip, which is the official UCI repository.

privileged_info_summary: The task assigns the user the role of an Information Security Engineer at a FinTech startup. The expected output file path is /home/ga/workspace/fintech_crypto/data/output_encrypted.csv, which is generated by encrypting the real-world UCI Bank Marketing Dataset downloaded from the official archive.
